body.title: Expose read_ring_memory() as Igor callable tool
body.result: Added prim_ring_read() to os_primitives.py — wires cortex.read_ring_memory() into the tool registry. Igor can now read his own recent IGOR_SAID/IGOR_HEARD ring buffer entries from a habit chain via ctx[ring_limit] and ctx[ring_category] inputs. Writes ring_entries + ring_count to traversal context. Catalog entry in primitives.json. 290 tests pass. Commit 5101ad7.
body.description: Wire cortex.read_ring_memory() into the tool registry so Igor can read his own recent IGOR_SAID/IGOR_HEARD ring buffer entries. Enables self-inspection of recent conversation history. Small add: new function in tools/metrics.py or os_primitives.py that calls self._cortex.read_ring_memory(limit=N) and returns formatted output.
